message:
Add markdown preview toggle to Contribute dialog description (#3456)

Adds Write/Preview tab toggle above the issue description textarea,
allowing users to preview their markdown-formatted description before
submitting. Uses react-markdown with remark-gfm and remark-breaks
(already in dependencies).

Closes #3455

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
